testcase.name: shouldFallbackWhenAccountServiceIsUnavailableAndOpenCircuit
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T20:46:32.014Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-06-03T20:46:32.016Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-06-03T20:46:32.018Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 1 ms 2026-06-03T20:46:32.021Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] c.e.e.controller.EventController : traceId=33db01a2-dabb-4f3a-be63-a2898252900e Received event evt-2 2026-06-03T20:46:32.040Z ERROR 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] c.e.e.controller.EventController : Account Service unavailable, traceId=531fea57-73fb-4990-965c-2df09f3a4421, error=500 Internal Server Error on POST request for "http://account-service:8081/accounts/acct-1/transactions": [no body] 2026-06-03T20:46:32.048Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] c.e.e.controller.EventController : traceId=52aaab53-0958-4b52-8717-1d48764a36ea Received event evt-2 2026-06-03T20:46:32.063Z ERROR 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] c.e.e.controller.EventController : Account Service unavailable, traceId=9473beae-edef-4346-99c0-70030a84b71b, error=500 Internal Server Error on POST request for "http://account-service:8081/accounts/acct-1/transactions": [no body] 2026-06-03T20:46:32.069Z ERROR 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] c.e.e.controller.EventController : Account Service unavailable, traceId=ff92244f-7f46-462b-ac71-35003f3c6ff5, error=CircuitBreaker 'accountService' is OPEN and does not permit further calls

testcase.name: shouldRejectInvalidEventPayload
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T20:46:32.135Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-06-03T20:46:32.135Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-06-03T20:46:32.138Z INFO 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 3 ms 2026-06-03T20:46:32.159Z WARN 73295 --- [event-gateway] [ main] [ ] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.eventledger.event_gateway.entity.Event> com.eventledger.event_gateway.controller.EventController.createEvent(com.eventledger.event_gateway.entity.Event) with 2 errors: [Field error in object 'event' on field 'currency': rejected value [null]; codes [NotBlank.event.currency,NotBlank.currency,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [event.currency,currency]; arguments []; default message [currency]]; default message [must not be blank]] [Field error in object 'event' on field 'amount': rejected value [0.0]; codes [DecimalMin.event.amount,DecimalMin.amount,DecimalMin.double,DecimalMin]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [event.amount,amount]; arguments []; default message [amount],true,0.01]; default message [Amount must be greater than 0]] ]
